arts.ttl: Tuesday’s briefing: Coote comes out as gay and Walker unveiled at AC Milan
arts.sum: Burnley and Leeds scrapped out a goalless draw at the top of the Championship as a familiar face returned to Celtic.

arts.ttl: Milan opening Gimenez bid considered insultingly low
arts.sum: There is confusion over exactly how much Milan have offered for Feyenoord striker Santiago Gimenez,...

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker made AC Milan move ‘to try something different’
arts.sum: Manchester City full-back Walker has moved to Milan on loan for the rest of the season, with an option to make the switch permanent.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker opens up on exit talks with Pep Guardiola after leaving Man City to join Milan on loan - and reveals it was NOT a 'comfortable conversation'
arts.sum: Walker, who has played an integral role for City under Guardiola since joining the club in 2017 from Tottenham Hotspur, admitted earlier this month that he wished to 'explore opportunities abroad'

arts.ttl: Sacked Milan coach Fonseca close to Olympique Lyonnais job
